entries.name: zcashd
entries.note: zcashd halts itself at block 3,417,100, roughly 11,000 blocks before Orchard stops taking deposits. A node that will not start cannot move your funds, so migrate to Zallet before then.

entries.name: Zallet
entries.note: The zcashd successor. It can import a unified full viewing key but cannot export one, so Turnstile cannot check a Zallet wallet — read your balance in the wallet instead.

entries.name: Zashi
entries.note: Shields to Orchard by default, so Zashi balances are the most likely to be affected. It cannot export a viewing key, so Turnstile cannot check it — the guide shows how to read your balance in the app.

entries.name: YWallet
entries.note: Exports a unified viewing key, so Turnstile can check it. Its key carries Sapling and Orchard but no transparent component, so transparent balances read as not visible.

entries.name: Zingo PC
entries.note: Exports a unified full viewing key and its birthday together. Turnstile's own scanning is built on zingolib.
